description: You are setting up tax compliance for the Urban Electronics Drupal Commerce store (http://localhost, admin / Admin1234!). Configure the store's tax settings by updating the timezone to 'America/Los_Angeles' (Pacific Time), adding 'US' to the tax registration countries, and updating the store's address line to '100 Commerce Boulevard'. Create a new customer account for the tax compliance officer with username 'taxmanager', email 'tax@urbanelectronics.com', and password 'TaxAdmin2024!'. Ensure the 'commerce_tax' module is enabled and the store's default currency is set to USD.
